description.en: Basic features such as date and time tracking, calendar, and event management.
description.zh: 基本功能，如日期和时间跟踪、日历和事件管理。

weaknesses.en: No detailed pricing information for premium tiers
weaknesses.zh: 高级套餐的定价信息不详细

targetAudience.en: General users who need basic date and time tracking and calendar management
targetAudience.zh: 需要基本日期和时间跟踪及日历管理的一般用户

positioning.en: A simple and user-friendly tool for managing dates, times, and events
positioning.zh: 一个简单易用的工具，用于管理和跟踪日期、时间和事件
